dry_run.description: Reflects the request: when `true`, no files were written.

entities_updated.description:
Entity files that had at least one relation modified and
(unless `dry_run`) rewritten on disk.

relations_at_floor.description:
Relations whose post-decay value landed exactly on `floor`
this pass. Pre-existing at-floor relations are excluded.

relations_decayed.description: Relations whose confidence was strictly reduced this pass.
